codeReview.summary: Extraction of JavaScript Basics and Control Flow modules is complete and accurate. All required topics are covered with clear explanations, code examples, tables, and gotchas. The content is well-organized and cheatsheet-worthy.

VAL-CHEAT-004.evidence: Module 5 covers: Variables (let/const/var), Variable Naming Rules, Data Types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, object), typeof operator, Arithmetic Operators (+, -, *, /, %, **), Operator Precedence, and Type Coercion with gotchas. All content is accurate and well-structured.

VAL-CHEAT-005.evidence: Module 6 covers: Comparisons (== vs ===), Object Comparison by reference, Logical Operators (&&, ||, !) with truth tables, and Ternary Operator with syntax examples. All content is accurate and includes practical examples.

summary: Review passed. The extraction for JavaScript Basics (Module 5) and JavaScript Control Flow (Module 6) is complete and accurate. All expected topics per the feature description are covered: variables (let/const/var), data types, operators, type coercion, comparisons (== vs ===), logical operators, and ternary. Content is well-organized with code examples, reference tables, gotchas, and flash cards for review. The extraction fulfills both VAL-CHEAT-004 and VAL-CHEAT-005 assertions.
